top_signals.title: Hackers steal Lidl customer data from external service provider
top_signals.summary: The retailer said the incident did not affect its online shopping platform itself but involved a separately stored customer database maintained by a third-party provider. According to notifications sent to Lidl's German, Belgian and Dutch customers on Friday, the attackers briefly accessed the file and exfiltrated part of its contents.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Manufacturing woes hamper US 155-mm ammo production
top_signals.summary: Manufacturing problems are dashing the U.S. Army’s plans to boost production of urgently needed 155-mm howitzer shells, a government watchdog said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Careless smoker accused of causing fatal Osaka fire in 2025
top_signals.summary: The police called for prosecutors to indict the man on charges of gross negligence resulting in an accidental fire.

top_signals.title: Microsoft starts testing cleaner Windows Search without ads
top_signals.summary: Microsoft is now testing a cleaner and faster version of Windows Search that should prioritize relevant results over ads and promotional content. [...]
